text: Unless otherwise provided in any statute withdrawing this state from participation in the agreement, the governor shall be the officer to give notice of withdrawal therefrom.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 14
##### § 409 — Notice of withdrawal

Unless otherwise provided in any statute withdrawing this state from participation in the agreement, the governor shall be the officer to give notice of withdrawal therefrom.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Unless otherwise provided in any statute withdrawing this state from participation in the agreement, the governor shall be the officer to give notice of withdrawal therefrom.
